raw_consumer_statement: I started a dispute with amexes for XXXX it was supposed to be resolved by XX/XX/XXXX they gave the merchant an extension until XX/XX/XXXX again they didnt respond and gave the merchant another extension to XX/XX/XXXX The merchant never responded to myself nor Amex and Amex provided no provisional credit When I call Amex no one helps me and Im transferred to the XX/XX/XXXX I am requesting to treated an a valued customer and for Amex to stop outsourcing and to stop giving extensions and to provide a provisional credit if necessary
